calendar.matters:
Petition To Determine That Title To Residence Is In Trust; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Oct-21-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Kevin Taheny appeared via zoom for Kristen Selberg (petitioner).

The Court waives any objections. Matter is taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Colohour. Not reported.

Petition To Determine That Title To Residence Is In Trust; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Aug-26-2024 Continued To Oct-21-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kevin Taheny appeared by zoom for Kirsten E. Selberg (petitioner/trustee).
Diana Leggett (daughter) appeared by zoom in propria persona.

This was a pre-granted matter. Mrs. Leggett stated that she objects to the validity of the current will and trust that was created six months before her mother's passing and that her mother already lacked capacity at that point. Mrs. Leggett also stated that she is in the process of interviewing a couple of attorneys. The Petition to Determine that Title to Residence is in Trust is continued to October 21, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mrs. Leggett is to file her objections on or before September 23, 2024. Mr. Taheny is to file his response on or before October 7, 2024. The court advised Mrs. Leggett that if her objections are not timely filed, there is the possibility of her objections being deemed waived.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Nguyen. Not reported.
